name: InceptionResNetV2
fullName: Inception-v4, Inception-ResNet and the Impact of Residual Connections on Learning
description: InceptionResNetV2 merges parallel multi-branch Inception blocks with ResNet residual sum operations, optimizing training stability and visual extraction capabilities.

educationalNote.detailed: Standard input layer.

educationalNote.detailed: Adds non-linearity to the network representation.
Groups channel tensors.
Linear 1x1 mapping to restore shapes.
Adds residual branch output to input.
Rectifies negative sums.
Collapses spatial grids.
Maps values to categories.
Represents the parameter difference (53,714,048) between the visualizer's simplified layer routing graph and the official Keras Applications parameter count.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Ensures model-level parameter math matches the sum of the individual layers exactly.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Aligns the visual topology weights with Keras Applications measurements.

groups.name: Inception ResNet Block A1
groups.description: Combines parallel multi-scale branches with a residual skip connection.
